ClientSideComponent.Name: Custom CSS Injector
ClientSideComponent.ComponentManifest: {"id":"c6e0f4a3-8d5f-6c1e-0b9d-3f4e5a6b7c8d","alias":"CustomCssInjectorWebPart","componentType":"WebPart","version":"0.0.1","manifestVersion":2,"supportedHosts":["SharePointWebPart","TeamsPersonalApp","TeamsTab","SharePointFullPage"],"supportsThemeVariants":true,"supportsFullBleed":true,"preconfiguredEntries":[{"groupId":"5c03119e-3074-46fd-976b-c60198311f70","group":{"default":"Advanced"},"title":{"default":"Custom CSS Injector"},"description":{"default":"Injects scoped CSS into the page head (one style element per web part instance, no duplicate tags)."},"officeFabricIconFontName":"Color","properties":{"customCss":"","hideWebPartUi":false}}],"loaderConfig":{"internalModuleBaseUrls":["https://localhost:4321/dist/"],"entryModuleId":"custom-css-injector-web-part","scriptResources":{"custom-css-injector-web-part":{"type":"path","path":"custom-css-injector-web-part.js"},"@microsoft/sp-core-library":{"type":"component","id":"7263c7d0-1d6a-45ec-8d85-d4d1d234171b","version":"1.22.2"},"@microsoft/sp-property-pane":{"type":"component","id":"f9e737b7-f0df-4597-ba8c-3060f82380db","version":"1.22.2"},"@microsoft/sp-webpart-base":{"type":"component","id":"974a7777-0990-4136-8fa6-95d80114c2e0","version":"1.22.2"},"CustomCssInjectorWebPartStrings":{"type":"path","path":"CustomCssInjectorWebPartStrings_en-us.js"}}}}
